gt_sql: SELECT T1.SEX FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.GPT = 9.0 AND T2.Date = '1992-06-12'
pred_sql: SELECT p.SEX FROM Patient p JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID WHERE l.GPT = 9 AND l.Date = '1992-06-12';
question: Was the patient a man or a women whose ALT glutamic pylvic transaminase status got 9 on 1992-6-12?
